preflight.note: Created before implementation work starts for authenticated local webhook and LAN integration adapters derived from CLV-018 related-adapter records.

acceptance_criteria.text: Define local webhook/LAN adapter contracts for authenticated inbound events, outbound local delivery, capability discovery, disabled states, replay prevention, and diagnostics health.
Keep all local webhook/LAN routes loopback or LAN-gated by default with explicit opt-in, origin/host checks, token or signature authentication, rate limits, and bounded payloads.

Implement local integration credentials with creation, rotation, revoke, per-integration labels, least privilege, and no plaintext credential leakage through renderer, logs, diagnostics, exports, or screenshots.

Normalize inbound local events into ForgeLink-owned agent messages, local messages, or signals only through explicit schemas and policy gates; reject malformed, oversized, replayed, or unauthorized events.
If outbound local callbacks or quick actions ship, require signed local pending-action IDs, expiration, replay protection, durable outcome records, and clear operator-visible scope.
Add UI for integration credentials, enabled/disabled state, last-used/rejected counters, allowed scope, rotate/revoke, test event, and diagnostics health.
Add deterministic tests for auth failure, revoked/disabled credentials, replay, rate limit, malformed payloads, successful normalization, policy rejection, and diagnostics redaction.
Document local-only boundaries, LAN exposure risks, setup, failure modes, and how this differs from public webhook ingress and telecom provider webhooks.
